title: Oxygen Station
overview: Human rights activist and political prisoner Mustafa, who became known after his 303-days hunger strike in prison, is exiled to Siberia to work at an oxygen station. Three people across the country were headed towards him, each with very different goals.

trailers.title: OXYGEN STATION I Trailer 2023
trailers.channel_name: PÖFF | Tallinn Black Nights Film Festival
